response.justification: Aisha has deep technical expertise, extensive open-source contributions, and strong leadership in software development, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and formal project management — key requirements for this executive role — and has only basic German proficiency, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Proven full-stack engineering experience across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing in IT teams
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, compliance, or risk management contexts
